overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a stone-built frontier settlement at night. The character ascends outdoor stairs, passes through a courtyard, and enters a warmly lit tavern with stone archways and wooden furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone stairway between high walls

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs between weathered stone walls toward the courtyard above

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending between high walls
rough-hewn stone walls with metal pipes and fixtures
vertical metal pipes and industrial equipment at the top of the stairs
large wooden support beam with decorative string lights

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone stairway flanked by high stone walls. Industrial pipes and wooden structural beams line the passage, with string lights providing warm illumination against the night sky.

events.description: character turns left at the top of the stairs to enter the courtyard
NPC runs past from right to left across the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the open courtyard toward the tavern entrance with the green awning

notable_agents.action: running quickly from right to left across the courtyard

entered.detail: green fabric awning marking the tavern entrance ahead
black metal railings along the path edges

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairway, the character turns left into an open cobblestone courtyard. An NPC runs past from the right as the character approaches a building entrance marked by a green canvas awning. Stone walls now form the perimeter of the space rather than enclosing the path.

events.description: character walks through the arched doorway into the tavern interior

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the tavern entrance beneath the green awning

entered.detail: large stone archway with metal trim marking the entrance
warm glowing lights visible inside the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the tavern entrance beneath the green canvas awning. Passing through the large stone archway, the scene transitions from the outdoor courtyard to the interior space, with warm artificial lighting becoming dominant.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tavern interior with wooden tables and multiple archways

events.description: character pauses briefly to look around the tavern interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious tavern hall, passing wooden dining tables and observing the stone architecture

entered.detail: long wooden table with chairs arranged along its length
simple wooden chairs surrounding the dining table
multiple arched doorways leading to other rooms
industrial-style ceiling lights providing warm illumination
red patterned runner rug along the main walkway
wooden bar area with stools visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Inside the tavern, the character explores a spacious hall with stone walls and multiple archways. Long wooden dining tables and chairs fill the space, illuminated by warm ceiling fixtures. The character walks along a red carpet runner, passing through the room and observing the bar area and various doorways leading deeper into the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed outdoor passage into the expansive, warmly lit interior of a frontier tavern. It begins as the character ascends a stone stairway flanked by high walls, industrial pipes, and glowing string lights against the night sky. As the character emerges from the stairs, the space opens into a cobblestone courtyard where an NPC runs past before the camera turns toward a building entrance marked by a green canvas awning. The scene then shifts from the outdoor air to the interior as the character passes through a large stone archway, allowing warm artificial lighting to become the dominant tone. Finally, the camera moves through a spacious hall featuring long wooden tables and a red carpet runner, gliding past various archways and the bar area deeper into the building.
